agave-margarita.name: Agave Margarita
instructions: Pour some kosher salt into a small dish. Rub 1 lime slice over half the rim of an Old Fashioned glass (if you prefer your Margarita on the rocks) or a coupe glass (if you prefer it up). Dip rim of glass into salt.
Combine tequila, agave syrup, and juice in a cocktail shaker; fill with ice and shake well. Strain into prepared glass. Garnish with second lime slice.

agave-sweetened-lemon-meringue-pie.name: Agave-sweetened Lemon Meringue Pie
instructions: Whisk water, 3/4 cup agave nectar, cornstarch, flour, zest and juice from 2 1/2 lemons, and salt together in a saucepan; bring to a boil just until lemon mixture coats a spoon, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir butter into lemon mixture until melted; remove saucepan from heat.

Whisk 1/2 cup lemon mixture with the egg yolks in a bowl to temper the yolks. Return saucepan to medium-low heat and slowly whisk tempered egg yolks into remaining lemon mixture until thickened, 3 to 5 minutes. Spoon lemon mixture into pie crust.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Beat egg whites and 1/2 teaspoon lemon juice in a clean bowl using an electric mixer until soft peaks form; add 2 tablespoons agave nectar and continue beating until stiff peaks form. Spoon egg white mixture on top of lemon mixture, making sure to completely cover the lemon mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until meringue is golden brown, about 10 minutes.

air-fryer-chicken-drumsticks.name: Air Fryer Chicken Drumsticks
instructions: Mix egg and water together in a shallow bowl. Combine cornflake crumbs, garlic powder, onion powder, 1/2 teaspoon salt, Cajun seasoning, chili powder, and paprika in a second shallow bowl.

Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C). Season drumsticks on both sides lightly with salt. Dip each drumstick into the egg mixture, followed by the cornflake mixture, rolling drumsticks and pressing down to ensure all surfaces are coated.

Spray the top of the chicken with cooking spray and place, sprayed side down, into the air fryer basket. Spray top of the drumsticks - you may need to put the drumsticks on their side depending on how large they are.

Air-fry for 10 minutes and carefully turn them over. Lower the temperature to 163°C (160 degrees C). Cook for an additional 10 minutes or until the internal temperature of the chicken is at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Check doneness after 5 minutes as drumstick size will determine time.

air-fryer-zucchini-chips.name: Air Fryer Zucchini Chips
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Combine panko and Parmesan cheese on a plate. Dip 1 zucchini slice into beaten egg then into panko mixture, pressing to coat. Place zucchini slice on a wire baking rack and repeat with remaining slices. Lightly spray zucchini slices with cooking spray.
Arrange zucchini slices in a single layer in the air fryer basket, working in batches if necessary.
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 10 minutes; flip the slices and cook 2 minutes more. Repeat with remaining zucchini slices.

almond-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Almond Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 ml de vino blanco de cocina

instructions: In a small pot, put some vegetable oil and dorate the almonds slightly with soft heat. Be very careful that you are not overgrown or burned.
Once they're ready get them out of the pot and put them back.
En esa misma olla, con el mismo aceite, echa las rebanadas de pan picadas en trozos con la mano y deja que se doren ligeramente.
When ready get him out of the pot and get ready.
Again, in the same pot with the same oil, put the onion into very small cubes.
Also put the garlic, as small minced.
It's always with soft hot cooking till the onion's slightly yellowish.
Mientras haces esto, puedes machacar las almendras con ayuda de un mortero.
Now you're gonna add the almonds and the bread into the pot where the onion and garlic are.
Echa el vino blanco y cocina a fuego alto un par de minutos.
En este momento puedes agregar el caldo y dejar que se cocine todo unos 15-20 minutos, a fuego suave.
After time, remove from the fire, let them cool a little and then shredded them all into an electrical glass or with them.
Tritura hasta que logres la textura deseada.
Puedes agregar sal al gusto.

almost-tuscan-sausage-and-kale-soup.name: Almost Tuscan Sausage And Kale Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large stockpot over medium heat until the oil shimmers; cook and stir onion, garlic, red pepper flakes, and black pepper until onion is translucent, 10 to 15 minutes.
Mix sausage, basil, and paprika together in a bowl.
Stir sausage mixture into onion mixture; cook and stir until sausage is browned and fully cooked, 5 to 10 minutes.
Add chicken broth, kale, cannellini beans, and potatoes to sausage-onion mixture; lower heat to medium-low. Cover stockpot and simmer until potatoes are tender, 15 to 20 minutes.

american-light.name: American Light
instructions: Combine Punt e Mes and Aperol in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice and top off with club soda.
Garnish with orange twist.

amish-friends-caramel-corn.name: Amish Friend's Caramel Corn
instructions: Preheat the oven to 121°C (120 degrees C). Grease two rimmed baking sheets. Place 1/2 of the popped popcorn and 1/2 of the peanuts onto each prepared baking sheet.
Bring brown sugar, margarine, corn syrup, and salt to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally to blend. Once boiling, boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla and baking soda; mixture will be light and foamy.
Immediately pour hot liquid over popcorn and nuts. Stir until pretty well coated.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, removing the pans and giving them each a good stir every 15 minutes.
Line your countertop with waxed paper. Remove popcorn and nuts from the oven; dump onto waxed paper and separate any large clumps. Allow to cool completely.
Enjoy!

and-delicious-strawberry-frozen-yogurt.name: And Delicious Strawberry Frozen Yogurt
instructions: Blend strawberries and lemon juice together in a blender until smooth; refrigerate until cold, about 1 hour.
Stir yogurt and sugar into strawberry mixture until well blended and smooth; pour mixture into the ice cream machine's container.
Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions for a soft-serve consistency.

and-dirt-cups.name: And Dirt Cups
instructions: Whisk cold milk and pudding mix together in a bowl for 2 minutes. Let stand until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Stir whipped topping and 1/2 of the crushed cookies into pudding.
Spoon 1 tablespoon crushed cookies into each of eight small glasses or ramekins; spoon pudding on top, filling 3/4 full.
Sprinkle remaining crushed cookies over top. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.

and-pointed-cabbage.name: And Pointed Cabbage

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Melt butter in a pot and saute shallot until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add pointed cabbage, stir, and cook for 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in vegetable broth and season with brown sugar, salt, and pepper.
Cover pot and simmer on low heat for 15 minutes. Season with balsamic vinegar.

angel-bogeyman-of-the-convent-of-cos-tel.name: Angel Bogeyman Of The Convent Of Cos
angel-bogeyman-of-the-convent-of-cos-tel.original_name: Papão de Anjo do Convento de Cós
instructions: Do the syrup: place the water, sugar, cinnamon stick and the lemon peels in the robot glass and program at steam temperature (120.3.) on Mycook for 5 minutes at the inverted minimum speed (speed 2 on Mycook). Lie in a bowl and let it cool.
The cream: lay the yolks in the robot cup, add the water and sugar, attach the mixer accessory and program at 100.3., for 5 minutes, at speed 3 (speed 4 on Mycook). Put it in a bowl and book it.

Garnish a large form with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Wash and clean the glass thoroughly, let it cool down, refit the mixer accessory, add the yolks and eggs and program at 37.3 Drop to the shape, take to the pre-heated oven at 180.3 Cut into slices, lie down in bowls, water with the syrup until it is soaked, pours over the sauce, sprinkles with cinnamon and serves decorated to taste.

angies-dilly-casserole-bread.name: Angie's Dilly Casserole Bread
instructions: Soften yeast in warm water; let stand 10 minutes.

Mix cottage cheese, sugar, butter, 1 teaspoon salt, and baking soda together in a large mixing bowl. Add dill seed, dried onion, egg, and yeast mixture; mix well. Gradually add flour, about 1/4 cup at a time, stirring well after each addition. If dough seems too sticky, add another 1 to 2 tablespoons flour.
Cover the bowl with a clean cotton kitchen towel and place in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Generously butter a 1 1/2- to 2-quart baking dish.
Gently stir dough to release bubbles. Transfer to the prepared baking dish.

Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 35 minutes. Remove from the oven; brush the top with melted butter and sprinkle on a pinch of salt. Leave in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

aperol-mist.name: Aperol Mist
instructions: Combine Aperol and lemon juice in a pint glass filled with ice. Top off with beer. Garnish with lemon twist.

apple-ladybug-treats.name: Apple Ladybug Treats
instructions: Slice apples in half from top to bottom and scoop out the cores using a knife or melon baller. If you have an apple corer, core them first, then slice. Place each apple half flat side down on a small plate.

Dab peanut butter on to the back of the 'lady bug', then stick raisins onto the dabs for spots. Use this method to make eyes too. Stick one end of each pretzel stick into a raisin, then press the other end into the apples to make antennae.

apple-mincemeat-pie.name: Apple Mincemeat Pie

ingredients.item: Of refrigerated pastry for double-crust pie (such as pillsbury®

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Place apples, butter, and lemon juice into a saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring often, until apples are tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Stir in sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix in mincemeat and walnuts until thoroughly combined and set the pie filling aside.

Fit pie crust into a 9-inch pie dish; pour filling into crust. With a brush dipped in water, moisten the edge of the bottom crust. Top pie with the second crust and crimp the two crusts together with a fork to seal. Cut 4 slits into top crust for steam vents. Whisk egg yolk with water in a small bowl and brush the yolk mixture over top crust.

Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove pie from the oven and cover the crust edges with strips of aluminum foil to prevent overbaking. Return pie to the oven and bake until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbling, 30 to 35 more minutes.

apple-slices-lezzet.name: Apple Slices
instructions: 1. Recipes that you are ready with your children.
2. Add milk and nuts oil with egg, sugar and salt mixer.
3. Then add the baking powder together with the flour you have, then add the spices into the mixture and mix together.
4. Pour the prepared mixture into unoiled tiny cake molds.
5. Fine slice of apples you peel and index the back to the back of the cake dough.
6. Spread the file nuts and my bird.
7. Cook for 30 minutes in the oven of 180 degrees.
8. Decorate and serve with a sauce you desire.

apricot-energy-bars-lezzet.name: Apricot Energy Bars

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of white drop chocolate (or small chopped normal white chocolate)

instructions: 1. Practical solution to sweet crisis.
4. Transfer the dry palms and apricots you extracted into the kitchen robot.
5. Add cinnamon with Chia seeds and crush until it becomes pure.
6. Add white chocolate and oatmegranate for Pumpkin beans and mix slightly.
7.  Take my cup from the kitchen robot, transfer it to a small tray with oil paper mass.
8. Fix well with Spatula.
9. Remove the refrigerator for thoroughly hardening of energy bars.
10. After waiting for a few hours, divide the energy bars into 16 equal parts and serve.

apricot-pie.name: Apricot Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

To make the dough: Mix flour and salt together in a bowl. Cut in shortening with a pastry cutter until mixture is crumbly. Using a fork, mix in water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until dough just holds together. Divide dough in half and form each half into a ball.

Roll each ball out on a floured surface into a crust big enough for a 9-inch pie dish with an inch or so to spare. Carefully lift one crust, fold it into quarters, position it into a 9-inch pie dish, and unfold to fit. Set second crust aside.

To make the filling: Mix 1 cup sugar, flour, and cinnamon together in a large bowl until thoroughly combined. Stir in apricots and lemon juice. Spoon filling over bottom crust, then top with remaining crust. Crimp crust edges together with a fork and cut away any excess. Cut slits into top crust to allow steam to escape. Cover the edges with strips of aluminum foil to prevent burning.

Bake on the center rack of the preheated oven until the pie is browned and the filling is bubbling and thickened, 35 to 45 minutes. Remove to a rack to cool and sprinkle top with remaining 1 teaspoon of sugar.

apricot-pistachio-muffins-baked-on-the-g.name: Apricot-pistachio Muffins Baked On The Grill
instructions: Set up a grill for indirect grilling, with only half or two-thirds of the burners lit on a gas grill or with the coals on one side. Bring the grill temperature to about 450°. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper or foil liners.
In a large bowl, whisk the flour with the cornmeal, salt, baking powder and baking soda.
In a medium bowl, whisk the sugar with the eggs, sour cream and butter; mix into the dry ingredients, then fold in the apricots and pistachios. The batter will be quite thick.

Spoon the batter into the muffin cups, filling each cup almost to the top. Set the muffin tin on the unlit side of the grill, close the lid and bake the muffins for 20 to 25 minutes, keeping the grill temperature between 400° and 450° and turning the pan once halfway through. The muffins are done when they are lightly browned on top and when a toothpick inserted in them comes out with a few moist crumbs attached.
Carefully transfer the muffins to a rack and let cool slightly. Serve warm or at room temperature with yogurt.

arnies-gimlet-slush.name: Arnie’s Gimlet Slush
instructions: Combine vodka, simple syrup, tea, and lime juice in a blender and freeze 3–12 hours (mixture will be partially frozen).
Add 2 cups ice to mixture and blend until thick and smooth. Divide among glasses and garnish with mint sprigs.

asian-green-bean-salad.name: Asian Green Bean Salad
instructions: Place green beans in a pot with water to cover; bring to a boil. Cook until tender, 6 to 8 minutes; drain.
Combine green beans, sugar, soy sauce, oil, mirin, and sweet chile sauce in a bowl. Mix thoroughly. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate 30 minutes to 4 hours. Mix in sesame seeds.

asparagus-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Asparagus Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of butter or olive oil
4 cup vegetable juice or chicken suy  u
1 cup milk or cream (optional, for creamy soup)

instructions: 1. The hard tip of the birds; break them and cut the tongue part to the small piece of certain to them.
2. Add butter or olive oil to the pot, then add onion and yellowms and roast until pink.
3. Add birds and ask for 2–3 minutes.
4. Urinary or chicken water to the car, taste salt and pepper.
5. Leave the cake to boil, and cook around 10–12 minutes until they are cooked.
6. Smooth.
7. If you want to add milk or cream to a short time warmer.
8. You are here:
9.  Afiyet olsun.

astorga-puff-pastries-or-mielitos-tradit.name: Astorga Puff Pastries Or Mielitos (traditional Recipe)
astorga-puff-pastries-or-mielitos-tradit.original_name: Hojaldres de Astorga o Mielitos (receta tradicional)

ingredients.item: Knife or circular cutter (you can buy here)
Nipple or small round cutter (you can buy here)

instructions: We put honey and sugar and lemon juice and water into a bowl. We mix well. We put our pits onto the medium-high fire, as we break to boil we put our fire down a little while and let them cook 5 minutes. We let them cool.

We purify the oven at 200 ″ 3 ″, heat up and down. We extend our plate and with a knife or a cutter as this cut equal squares. The size of the squares depends on the size of your plate. We cut 24 squares about 6 cm from each sheet. In our case, as our pint sheets were thick, we have used 3 squares for each cake. That's to say that from every sheet we put out 8 pies, and we used 2 sheets of tin and we made 16 pies. If the plate that you use is very thin, use 3-4 and 4-5 square sheets for each cake.

With a round nozzle or a cutter we will put a central hole into the squares that will go above every cake. That's why if for every cake you'll wear 3 layers of paddle, the hole will be 1 / 3 of the squares, if you'll wear 4 layers, 1 / 4. We pinch with water the centre of the square without a hole, without reaching the edges, and we get about two for every cake. We finish every cake with a padded square. We put the pies on an oven plate covered with baking paper and we brush with beaten egg. It leaves space between them because they get quite bigger in the oven.
We put the plate in the oven at medium height and bake for 15 minutes or till they are golden. We withdraw and let them cool onto a grid.

Let's get every cake and put it into the syrup, half a minute from each side. We let them slip onto a grid, we suggest you put paper or aluminium under them so that you don't have to scrape after the drops that fall.

asturian-rice-pudding-pequerecetas.name: Asturian Rice Pudding

ingredients.item: Optional: a tablespoon of sweet anise liquor

instructions: Comenzamos poniendo en un cazo los 200g de agua y los 200g de arroz, cocinando a fuego medio-bajo hasta que el agua se consuma.

Then, in a pot, we warm milk with lemon skin and cinnamon stick till it starts to boil. At that time, we added early rice and let them cook with medium-low heat till they are tender about 1 hour. We have to remove often to stop the rice from pounding. Incorporate sugar and anise liquor as soon as the rice's tender, keep cooking till it's nearly broken.
Remove from fire, remove lemon skin and cinnamon. Dig and cool.

The last step is the most exciting: to burn the sugar to give that characteristic caramelized taste! We sprinkle with the sugar mixed with cinnamon above and we burn with a sugar burner as this or with a kitchen blow of this type and make sure to get that crispy and golden cape!

avocado-and-quinoa-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Avocado And Quinoa Salad Recipe
avocado-and-quinoa-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada de aguacate y quinoa
instructions: Wash the quinoa well till you remove all impurities.
Put the washed quinoa with two cups a of water to boil for about 30 minutes or until well sponsed.
Once ready, turn off and run well and let cool.
When the quinoa's ready, put into a bowl and add the cut tomatoes and ion.
Add avocado and tanned cilantro. Saxony with salt to aste, lemon juice and an olive oil chorrit. Mix till everything's integrated.
Serves on a plate, decorated with more cilantro and ready.

avocado-and-roasted-chickpea-toast.name: Avocado And Roasted Chickpea Toast
instructions: Spread mashed avocado over toast, and top with roasted chickpeas and a dash of hot sauce.
Enjoy!

avocado-toast-on-rye-bread-and-delicious.name: Avocado Toast On Rye Bread: And Delicious Recipe
avocado-toast-on-rye-bread-and-delicious.original_name: Tostas de aguacate en pan de centeno: receta fácil y deliciosa

ingredients.item: 2  cucharadas de queso crema (puede ser queso ricotta)
A handful of elk or spinach leaves
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva

instructions: First, you have to toast the slice of rye bread. If you have toaster, and if you have toaster, and if you have toaster, and if you don't, you can do it in a frying pan with medium heat, just make sure that it's crispy but without passing.
Mientras el pan se tuesta, corta el aguacate en rodajas bonitas y finitas.

Once the bread is roasted, put a generous cape of cream cheese onto every slice. Don't get cut. That's the creamy touch that's gonna give your toast a living. If you're using ricotta, apply it as well.
Now put some ruula or spinach leaves onto the cheese.
Then put the avocado slices onto the green leaves.

Finally, scattering pumpkin and sesame seeds above. That's the trick to give her that crunchy touch. Add salt and pepper to suit and, if you feel extra sophisticated, an olive oil chorrit gives you a perfect final touch.

awesome-yogurt-coffee-cake-with-brown-su.name: Awesome Yogurt Coffee Cake With Brown Sugar-cinnamon Topping
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup flour, brown sugar, 1/4 cup butter, walnuts, pecans, and cinnamon in a bowl until crumbly; set topping aside.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Coat a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt) with cooking spray.

Beat white sugar, yogurt, remaining 3/4 cup butter, milk, eggs, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Slowly mix in remaining 3 cups flour until combined; batter will be thick. Pour 1/2 batter into bottom of the prepared pan; generously spread 1/2 brown sugar-cinnamon topping over batter. Top with remaining 1/2 batter followed by remaining 1/2 topping.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 45 to 50 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen; tap the pan firmly a few times, then shake it gently to loosen the cake. Place a wire rack over the pan and invert to release cake onto the rack, then invert onto a plate, brown sugar-cinnamon-side up.
